mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate signals a weakening labor market, which compresses demand for goods and services, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the goods demand proxy signals a weakening economy, which compresses aggregate spending and production, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS falls below 400 million in 3 months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the supply proxy signals an increase in production capacity, which expands aggregate spending and production, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the labor cost proxy signals an increase in production costs, which compresses aggregate spending and production, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the monetary policy proxy signals a decrease in central bank intervention, which compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the goods demand proxy signals an increase in aggregate spending and production, which expands S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS rises above 450 million in 1 month
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the labor cost proxy signals a decrease in production costs, which expands aggregate spending and production, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS falls below 140 thousand in 3 months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the supply proxy signals an increase in production capacity, which expands aggregate spending and production, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
